data.description: أهم 100 معادلة في هندسة الري — هيدروليكا، مضخات، تنقيط ورش، جدولة، جودة مياه، FAO-56 — مع الشرح والوحدات. Top 100 irrigation engineering equations reference.
data.html:
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl"><head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<script>
/* ============ GLOBAL LANGUAGE (AR/EN) ============ */
window.LANG=(function(){try{return localStorage.getItem('atlas_lang')||'ar'}catch(e){return 'ar'}})();
function T(ar,en){return window.LANG==='en'?en:ar;}
function toggleLang(){try{localStorage.setItem('atlas_lang',window.LANG==='en'?'ar':'en')}catch(e){};location.reload();}
if(window.LANG==='en'){document.documentElement.lang='en';document.documentElement.dir='ltr';}
window.THEME=(function(){try{return localStorage.getItem('atlas_theme')||'dark'}catch(e){return 'dark'}})();
if(window.THEME==='light')document.documentElement.classList.add('light');
function toggleTheme(){try{localStorage.setItem('atlas_theme',window.THEME==='light'?'dark':'light')}catch(e){};location.reload();}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){
  // أرقام إنجليزية دائماً في خانات الإدخال (تمنع الأرقام الهندية ١٢٣)
  function fixDigits(){document.querySelectorAll('input[type=number]').forEach(function(el){el.setAttribute('lang','en');el.style.fontFamily="'Space Mono',monospace";});}
  fixDigits();
  new MutationObserver(fixDigits).observe(document.body,{childList:true,subtree:true});
  if(window.LANG!=='en')return;
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-en]').forEach(function(el){
    // الحاويات الديناميكية: لو اتملت بنتائج قبل DOMContentLoaded ما نمسحهاش
    if(el.hasAttribute('data-dyn')&&el.children.length>0)return;
    el.innerHTML=el.getAttribute('data-en');
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-en-ph]').forEach(function(el){el.placeholder=el.getAttribute('data-en-ph');});
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-en-title]').forEach(function(el){el.title=el.getAttribute('data-en-title');});
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-en-label]').forEach(function(el){el.setAttribute('label',el.getAttribute('data-en-label'));});
});
</script>

<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Irrigation Equations Reference — أهم 100 معادلة في هندسة الري — Irrigation Atlas</title>
<meta name="description" content="أهم 100 معادلة في هندسة الري — هيدروليكا، مضخات، تنقيط ورش، جدولة، جودة مياه، FAO-56 — مع الشرح والوحدات. Top 100 irrigation engineering equations reference.">
<meta name="keywords" content="irrigation equations, FAO-56, Penman-Monteith, Hazen-Williams, Darcy-Weisbach, NPSH, drip irrigation, sprinkler, SAR, معادلات الري, هيدروليكا">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://irrigationatlas.com/equations">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Tajawal:wght@300;400;500;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script>window.MathJax = { tex: { inlineMath: [['$', '$']] }, options: { enableMenu: false } };</script>
<script defer="" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-chtml.js"></script>
<style>
:root{--bg:#060a08;--s1:#0c1510;--s2:#111e14;--border:#1c2e20;--border2:#243829;--green:#00e676;--green3:#069e42;--greendim:#0a5c28;--greenmuted:#072e14;--accent:#00bcd4;--gold:#ffd740;--warn:#ff9800;--danger:#f44336;--text:#e8f5ec;--textdim:#8ab89a;--textmuted:#3d6648;--r:10px;--rl:14px;}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden;}
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(0,230,118,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,230,118,0.03) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px;pointer-events:none;z-index:0;}
.container{max-width:1280px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
header{padding:16px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);position:sticky;top:0;background:rgba(6,10,8,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);z-index:200;}
.hinner{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;}
.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;text-decoration:none;}
.logo-mark{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;flex-shrink:0;object-fit:contain;display:block;}
.logo-en{font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:var(--green);}
.logo-ar{font-size:11px;color:var(--textmuted);}
.tool-nav-btn{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--textdim);padding:8px 14px;border-radius:9px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;transition:all .2s;white-space:nowrap;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.tool-nav-btn:hover{border-color:var(--green);color:var(--green);}
.tool-nav-btn.active{background:var(--green);border-color:var(--green);color:#04140a;}
/* hamburger (mobile) */
.nav-burger{display:none;background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);border-radius:9px;padding:8px 13px;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;cursor:pointer;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.mobile-menu{display:none;}
@media(max-width:860px){
  header nav a.tool-nav-btn{display:none;}            /* hide inline links */
  .nav-burger{display:inline-flex;}
  .mobile-menu{display:none;position:absolute;top:100%;right:0;left:0;background:var(--s1);border-bottom:2px solid var(--green);box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.35);z-index:300;}
  .mobile-menu.open{display:block;}
  .mobile-menu a{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:13px 18px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;}
  .mobile-menu a.active{color:var(--green);background:var(--greenmuted);border-right:3px solid var(--green);}
  header{position:relative;}
}
.tool-nav-btn:hover,
.tool-hero{padding:36px 0 20px;text-align:center;}
.htag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--greenmuted);border:1px solid var(--greendim);color:var(--green);padding:6px 16px;border-radius:20px;font-size:12px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;margin-bottom:18px;}
.tool-hero h1{font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,40px);font-weight:800;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:10px;}
.tool-hero h1 em{color:var(--green);font-style:normal;}
.tool-hero p{font-size:14px;color:var(--textdim);max-width:640px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;}

/* ===== APP SHELL ===== */
.app-shell{display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px 1fr;gap:20px;align-items:start;padding:24px 0 48px;}
.sidebar{background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:var(--rl);padding:16px;position:sticky;top:84px;max-height:calc(100vh - 104px);overflow-y:auto;}
.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;}
.sidebar::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border2);border-radius:3px;}
.side-title{font-size:11px;color:var(--textmuted);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;margin-bottom:12px;letter-spacing:1px;}
.nav-list{display:grid;gap:5px;}
.nav-btn{border:1px solid var(--border2);background:transparent;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;text-align:start;color:var(--textdim);font-size:12.5px;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-weight:500;transition:all .15s;}
.nav-btn:hover{border-color:var(--greendim);color:var(--green);}
.nav-btn.active{background:var(--greenmuted);border-color:var(--greendim);color:var(--green);font-weight:700;}

.topbar{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;background:var(--s1);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:var(--rl);margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.search-wrap{flex:1;min-width:200px;}
.search-wrap input{width:100%;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--s2);color:var(--text);font-size:14px;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;outline:none;}
.search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--green3);}
.search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--textmuted);}
.icon-btn{border:1px solid var(--border2);background:var(--s2);padding:9px 14px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--textdim);font-weight:700;font-size:12px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;transition:all .15s;white-space:nowrap;}
.icon-btn:hover{border-color:var(--greendim);color:var(--green);}
#sidebarToggle{display:none;}

.dashboard{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.stat-card{background:var(--s1);padding:14px;border-radius:var(--r);border:1px solid var(--border2);text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.stat-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--accent));}
.stat-card h4{margin:0 0 6px;color:var(--textmuted);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;}
.stat-card strong{font-size:22px;color:var(--green);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;}

.equations-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(380px,1fr));gap:14px;}
.equation-card{background:var(--s1);padding:18px;border-radius:var(--rl);border:1px solid var(--border2);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.equation-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--accent));opacity:.6;}
.eq-name{color:var(--green);margin:0 0 8px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);padding-bottom:7px;}
.category-pill{display:inline-block;background:var(--greenmuted);border:1px solid var(--greendim);color:var(--textdim);font-size:10px;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;}
.math-block{background:var(--bg);padding:14px;border-radius:var(--r);margin:12px 0;text-align:center;font-size:1.15rem;border:1px solid var(--greendim);overflow-x:auto;color:var(--green);direction:ltr;}
.math-block mjx-container{color:var(--green)!important;}
.eq-description{font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:10px;color:var(--textdim);border-inline-start:3px solid var(--accent);padding-inline-start:10px;}
.vars-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;}
.vars-list li{padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px dashed var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:12px;}
.vars-list li:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.vars-list .sym{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);min-width:52px;direction:ltr;display:inline-block;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:11.5px;}
.vars-list .eq-sign{color:var(--textmuted);font-weight:bold;}
.vars-list .meaning{color:var(--textdim);}
.hidden{display:none!important;}

footer{border-top:1px solid var(--border2);padding:28px 0;text-align:center;color:var(--textmuted);font-size:12px;}
footer b{color:var(--green);}

@media(max-width:900px){
  .app-shell{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .sidebar{display:none;position:fixed;inset-block:0;inset-inline-start:0;z-index:300;width:80%;max-width:320px;max-height:100vh;border-radius:0;box-shadow:5px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,.6);top:0;}
  .sidebar.open{display:block;}
  #sidebarToggle{display:inline-block;}
  .equations-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}

@media print{
  :root{--bg:#ffffff;--s1:#ffffff;--s2:#f5f5f5;--border:#cccccc;--border2:#bbbbbb;--green:#1a6b3a;--green3:#1a6b3a;--greendim:#9bd1ae;--greenmuted:#eef7f1;--accent:#00697a;--gold:#8a6d00;--warn:#a35a00;--danger:#b00020;--text:#111111;--textdim:#444444;--textmuted:#666666;}
  *{-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;print-color-adjust:exact;}
  body{background:#fff!important;color:#111!important;}
  body::before{display:none!important;}
  header,footer,nav,.sidebar,.topbar,.view-tabs,.icon-btn,.dashboard,.tool-hero{display:none!important;}
  .app-shell{display:block;padding:0;}
  .equation-card{break-inside:avoid;border:1px solid #999!important;margin-bottom:14px;background:#fff!important;}
  .math-block{background:#f7f7f7!important;border-color:#bbb!important;}
  .math-block mjx-container{color:#1a6b3a!important;}
}

/* === print branding & floating print button === */
.print-brand{display:none;}
.global-print-btn{position:fixed;bottom:18px;left:18px;z-index:600;background:var(--greenmuted);border:1px solid var(--greendim);color:var(--green);border-radius:50%;width:48px;height:48px;font-size:19px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.45);transition:all .2s;}
.global-print-btn:hover{background:var(--green);color:#060a08;}
@media print{
  .print-brand{display:block!important;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#1a6b3a!important;border-bottom:2px solid #1a6b3a;padding:0 0 8px;margin:0 0 14px;}
  .print-brand .pb-meta{color:#666!important;font-weight:400;font-size:11px;}
  .global-print-btn{display:none!important;}
  .chartbox{break-inside:avoid;}
  .chartbox canvas{max-height:none!important;width:100%!important;}
  #atlas-restore-banner{display:none!important;}
}

/* === print footer: repeats at bottom of every printed page === */
.print-brand-foot{display:none;}
@media print{
  body{padding-bottom:34px!important;}
  .print-brand-foot{display:block!important;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;color:#1a6b3a!important;border-top:1.5px solid #1a6b3a;padding:5px 0 0;background:#fff;text-align:center;}
  .print-brand-foot .pbf-meta{color:#666!important;font-weight:400;}
}

/* ============ MOBILE RESPONSIVE ============ */
@media(max-width:768px){
  .container{padding:0 12px;}
  .hinner{flex-wrap:nowrap;gap:8px;}
  header nav{flex-wrap:nowrap!important;overflow-x:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none;max-width:none;flex:1;justify-content:flex-start;}
  header nav::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
  .tool-nav-btn{flex-shrink:0;}
  .logo-ar{display:none;}
  .logo-en{font-size:14px;}
  .logo-mark{width:32px;height:32px;font-size:15px;border-radius:8px;}
  input,select,textarea{font-size:16px!important;}
  .global-print-btn{width:42px;height:42px;font-size:17px;bottom:12px;left:10px;}
  .tool-hero{padding:22px 0 10px;}
  .tool-hero h1{font-size:23px;}
  .tool-hero p{font-size:12.5px;padding:0 6px;}
  .htag{font-size:10px;padding:5px 12px;}
  .kgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .rcard-val{font-size:20px;}
  /* generic: collapse tight inline grids */
  div[style*="repeat(4,1fr)"]{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)!important;}
  .dtable{font-size:11px;}
  .dtable th,.dtable td{padding:7px 8px;}
}

/* ============ LIGHT THEME ============ */
html.light{
  --bg:#f3f7f4; --s1:#ffffff; --s2:#eaf2ec;
  --border:#d7e4da; --border2:#c6d9cb;
  --green:#0a8f4d; --green3:#0b7a3e; --greendim:#9fd8b4; --greenmuted:#e4f4e9;
  --accent:#0789a0; --gold:#9a7a10; --warn:#b56a00; --danger:#cc3a2b;
  --text:#152a1d; --textdim:#41604d; --textmuted:#7d957f;
}
html.light .logo-mark{filter:drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(7,137,160,.35));}
html.light .tool-nav-btn{background:var(--s1);}
html.light .global-print-btn{box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(10,143,77,.3);}

/* print watermark */
.print-watermark{display:none;}
@media print{
  .print-watermark{display:block!important;position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    width:65%;height:65%;background:url('/logo.png') center/contain no-repeat;opacity:0.07;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}
}

<script>
const raw = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('equationsData').textContent);
const state = { lang: (window.LANG||'ar'), activeCat: 'All', query: '' };

function updateUI() {
  const d = raw.dict[state.lang];
  document.documentElement.lang = state.lang;
  document.documentElement.dir = state.lang === 'ar' ? 'rtl' : 'ltr';
  document.getElementById('searchInput').placeholder = d.search;
  document.getElementById('langToggle').textContent = state.lang === 'ar' ? 'EN' : 'AR';
  renderNav();
  filterAndRender();
}

function renderNav() {
  const d = raw.dict[state.lang];
  let html = `<button class="nav-btn ${state.activeCat === 'All' ? 'active' : ''}" data-cat="All">${d.all}</button>`;
  for (let k in raw.categories) {
    const label = state.lang === 'ar' ? raw.categories[k][0] : raw.categories[k][1];
    html += `<button class="nav-btn ${state.activeCat === k ? 'active' : ''}" data-cat="${k}">${label}</button>`;
  }
  document.getElementById('categoryNav').innerHTML = html;
}

function filterAndRender() {
  const q = state.query.toLowerCase();
  const filtered = raw.equations.filter(e => {
    const matchCat = state.activeCat === 'All' || e.cat === state.activeCat;
    if(!matchCat) return false;
    if(!q) return true;
    const nAr=e.n_ar.toLowerCase(), nEn=e.n_en.toLowerCase(), f=e.form.toLowerCase();
    const dAr=e.d_ar.toLowerCase(), dEn=e.d_en.toLowerCase();
    const syms=e.v.map(v=>v[0].toLowerCase()).join(' ');
    return nAr.includes(q)||nEn.includes(q)||f.includes(q)||dAr.includes(q)||dEn.includes(q)||syms.includes(q);
  });

  const d = raw.dict[state.lang];
  document.getElementById('dashboard').innerHTML = `
    <div class="stat-card"><h4>${d.total}</h4><strong>${raw.equations.length}</strong></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><h4>${d.showing}</h4><strong>${filtered.length}</strong></div>
    <div class="stat-card"><h4>${state.lang==='ar'?'التصنيفات':'Categories'}</h4><strong>${Object.keys(raw.categories).length}</strong></div>
  `;

  document.getElementById('equationsGrid').innerHTML = filtered.map(e => `
    <article class="equation-card">
      <h3 class="eq-name">${e.id}. ${state.lang === 'ar' ? e.n_ar : e.n_en}</h3>
      <span class="category-pill">${state.lang === 'ar' ? raw.categories[e.cat][0] : raw.categories[e.cat][1]}</span>
      <div class="math-block">$${e.form}$</div>
      <p class="eq-description">${state.lang === 'ar' ? e.d_ar : e.d_en}</p>
      <ul class="vars-list">
        ${e.v.map(v => `
          <li>
            <span class="sym">${v[0]}</span>
            <span class="eq-sign">=</span>
            <span class="meaning">${state.lang === 'ar' ? v[1] : v[2]}</span>
          </li>
        `).join('')}
      </ul>
    </article>
  `).join('');

  if (window.MathJax && MathJax.typeset) { try { MathJax.typeset(); } catch(err) {} }
}

document.getElementById('langToggle').onclick = () => {
  try{localStorage.setItem('atlas_lang',state.lang==='ar'?'en':'ar');}catch(e){}
  location.reload();
};
document.getElementById('searchInput').oninput = (e) => {
  state.query = e.target.value;
  filterAndRender();
};
document.getElementById('categoryNav').onclick = (e) => {
  if (e.target.dataset.cat) {
    state.activeCat = e.target.dataset.cat;
    renderNav();
    filterAndRender();
    if(window.innerWidth < 900) document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
  }
};
document.getElementById('printBtn').onclick = () => window.print();
document.getElementById('sidebarToggle').onclick = (e) => {
  e.stopPropagation();
  document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open');
};
document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  const sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
  if(window.innerWidth < 900 && sb.classList.contains('open') && !sb.contains(e.target) && e.target.id!=='sidebarToggle'){
    sb.classList.remove('open');
  }
});

updateUI();
</script>

<script>
// ── RESTORE LOCATION FROM ATLAS ──
(function() {
  try {
    const geo = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('atlas_geo') || 'null');
    const et0 = sessionStorage.getItem('atlas_et0');
    if (!geo) return;

    const banner = document.createElement('div');
    banner.id = 'atlas-restore-banner';
    banner.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:9999;background:rgba(6,10,8,.96);border-top:1px solid var(--greendim);padding:8px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);font-family:"Tajawal",sans-serif;';
    banner.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex:1;min-width:0;">
        <span style="font-size:18px">📍</span>
        <div style="min-width:0;">
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;">${geo.display_ar}</div>
          ${et0 ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--textmuted);font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">ET₀ اليوم: <span style="color:#ffd740">${et0} mm/d</span></div>` : ''}
        </div>
      </div>
      <a href="/" style="background:rgba(0,230,118,.12);border:1px solid rgba(0,230,118,.3);color:#00e676;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600;">🌍 تغيير الموقع</a>
      <button onclick="this.closest('#atlas-restore-banner').remove();" style="background:none;border:none;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);cursor:pointer;font-size:18px;line-height:1;padding:2px 6px;">×</button>
    `;
    document.body.appendChild(banner);
  } catch(e) {}
})();
</script>
<script>
// === print: brand metadata + chart resize fix ===
window.addEventListener('beforeprint',function(){
  try{
    var meta=document.querySelector('.print-brand .pb-meta');
    if(meta){
      var d=new Date();
      var txt=' · '+d.toLocaleDateString(window.LANG==='en'?'en-GB':'ar-EG',{year:'numeric',month:'long',day:'numeric'});
      var g=(typeof GEO!=='undefined'&&GEO)?GEO:null;
      if(!g){try{g=JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('atlas_geo')||'null');}catch(e){}}
      if(g&&g.display_ar)txt+=' · 📍 '+g.display_ar;
      meta.textContent=txt;
      var foot=document.querySelector('.print-brand-foot .pbf-meta');
      if(foot)foot.textContent=txt;
    }
    if(typeof charts!=='undefined'&&charts)Object.keys(charts).forEach(function(k){try{charts[k].resize(900,320);}catch(e){}});
  }catch(e){}
});
window.addEventListener('afterprint',function(){
  try{if(typeof charts!=='undefined'&&charts)Object.keys(charts).forEach(function(k){try{charts[k].resize();}catch(e){}});}catch(e){}
});
</script>
<div class="print-brand-foot">💧 Irrigation Atlas · irrigationatlas.com — <span data-en="Eng. Abdelmonem Hebesh">م. عبدالمنعم حبيش</span> <span class="pbf-meta"></span></div>
<script>
function toggleMenu(){document.getElementById('mobileMenu').classList.toggle('open');}
document.addEventListener('click',function(e){
  var m=document.getElementById('mobileMenu');
  if(m&&m.classList.contains('open')&&!e.target.closest('header'))m.classList.remove('open');
});
</script>
<script>
if('serviceWorker' in navigator)navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js').catch(function(){});
</script>


</body></html>
